Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}So, there won't be any more classes this afternoon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}But that doesn't mean you're free to goof around![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}It's time to work together and put away the culture festival displays and decorations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}I'll assign you into three groups for the cleanup.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}The first group will go to the science lab. Your leader will be...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Afternoon classes were canceled so we[n]could clean up the culture festival displays...[n]{f 1 1}
